definition.name: def-near-fixed-algebra
definition.definition: Let P be the spectral idempotent of an almost-idempotent positive-unital map Phi on B(H)_sa. The near-fixed algebra is its range A=Im P=Ker(1-P) subseteq B(H)_sa, a real subspace containing 1. The order, unit, and order-unit norm on A are inherited EXACTLY from B(H)_sa (only the projected Jordan product a bullet b := P(a circ b) is approximate). Inherited cone A_+ = A cap (B(H)_sa)_+.
